updateCmd: kitty -e bash -c 'echo "Updating System...";yay --noconfirm; flatpak update; read -n 1 -p "Press any key to exit..."'
cleanupCmd: paccache -r 2>/dev/null; yay -Sc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; sudo pacman -Rns $(pacman -Qdtq) --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; flatpak uninstall --unused --delete-data -y 2>/dev/null; journalctl --vacuum-time=7d 2>/dev/null
